description_long: This is a rectangular, freestanding wooden cabinet with a light, natural wood grain finish. The front features two vertical doors, each with a simple rectangular handle, and one of the doors incorporates a large, dark glass or acrylic panel, likely for partial visibility of the interior. The top surface is flat and slightly overhangs the body, providing a small ledge. The sides and back are plain, with the back panel appearing to be a solid, lighter-colored material, possibly a laminate or painted wood. The cabinet is designed for storage and could be used in urban environments such as offices, garages, or public spaces. Its construction suggests it is sturdy and functional, with a modern, minimalist aesthetic.
description: A light wood-grain cabinet with two front doors, one featuring a large dark glass panel, and simple rectangular handles. The design is modern and functional, suitable for urban storage.
description_view_0: The left side of the cabinet, showing a plain, vertical wood-grain panel with no visible features.
description_view_1: The front view, displaying two doors with rectangular handles and a large dark glass panel on the right door.
description_view_2: The right side of the cabinet, similar to the left, with a plain wood-grain panel and no distinguishing features.
description_view_3: The back of the cabinet, featuring a solid, light-colored panel with no visible openings or handles.
